name: Indian Chickpeas
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the chickpeas overnight, rinse them, and cook in water until tender.
2. Drain the chickpeas, but keep the cooking liquid.
3. Heat oil in a frying pan. Fry onion until golden brown.
4. Add cinnamon and cloves; cook for a few seconds.
5. Add garlic, ginger, chili pepper, and ground coriander; stir for 5 minutes.
6. Add chopped tomatoes with their juice; cook until all liquid has evaporated.
7. Stir in the chickpeas, mix well, and cook for 5 more minutes.
8. Pour in the reserved cooking liquid from the chickpeas and simmer for 25 minutes until all liquid is absorbed.
9. Sprinkle with garam masala and cilantro. Serve hot or cold.
